summary_text: Found an existing path: `scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh` already supports single-event ingestion via `--seed-input`. **Seed payload shape (minimum practical for this case):** ```json [ { "notion_page_id": "33a6b8c0-f0ac-8159-ac93-c195a88926a7", "cursorvers_post_id": "33a6b8c0f0ac8159ac93c195a88926a7", "source_url": "https://x.com/rohanpaul_ai/status/2041254260621676792?s=20", "author_handle": "rohanpaul_ai", "display_name": "", "topic_tags": ["medical-ai", "governance"], "conclusion_tag": "limited regulatory mitigation", "pattern_tag": "quoted", "metadata": { "extractor": "manual-seed-from-x-auto-row", "candidate_trigger_url": "https://x.com/rohanpaul_ai/status/2041254260621676792?s=20", "schedule_mode": "operator_override", "category": "医療AI法規制/ガバナンス" } } ] ``` **Exact smoke command (validated):** ```bash bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh \ --mode smoke \ --seed-input /tmp/xauto-quoted-author-seed-33a6.json \ --run-dir /tmp/xauto-quoted-author-run-33a6 ``` **Exact execute command (write path):** ```bash SUPABASE_URL="https://haaxgwyimoqzzxzdaeep.supabase.co" \ SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY="$(python3 - <<'PY' import sys sys.path.insert(0, '/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto') import config print(config.get_secret('SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY')) PY )" \ X_AUTO_QUOTED_AUTHOR_SYNC_WRITE_MODE=required \ bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-quoted-author-sync.sh \ --mode execute \ --seed-input /tmp/xauto-quoted-author-seed-33a6.json \ --run-dir /tmp/xauto-quoted-author-run-33a6 ``` Note: in this environment, actual write currently depends on bridge support for SQL execution (`raw_sql` RPC). If that RPC is missing, `--mode execute` will fail even with correct seed/invocation.
